zarr_dir.title: Zarr Dir
zarr_dir.description: Directory to store the OME-Zarr containers.

overlap_label_prefix.title: Overlap Label Prefix
overlap_label_prefix.description: Prefix for the overlap labels. Defaults to "Cells".

nucleus_table_name.title: Nucleus Table Name
nucleus_table_name.description: Name of the nucleus table (parent). Defaults to "Nucleus_features".

cytoplasm_table_name.title: Cytoplasm Table Name
cytoplasm_table_name.description: Name of the cytoplasm table (parent). Defaults to "Cytoplasm_features".

child_object_table_names.title: Child Object Table Names
child_object_table_names.description: Names of the child object tables. Defaults to None.

authors: Facility for Advanced Imaging and Microscopy (FAIM), FMI, Basel
